name: Local Biz Ops · Web lead → CRM → follow-up

messages.content: You are a lead-structurer for a local home-services / trades business. Take the raw web lead and return STRICT JSON with these keys: {"name": string, "email": string, "phone": string, "intent": one of "emergency"|"quote"|"booking"|"general", "service": short service line e.g. "furnace repair", "urgency": "low"|"medium"|"high", "summary": one-sentence summary}. Copy name/email/phone verbatim — never invent contact details. If a field is missing, use an empty string. Pick "emergency" only for no-heat / no-power / flooding / gas-smell situations.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.name, email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, intent: $json.intent, message: $('Verify HMAC').item.json.message, source: 'n8n-web', structured: { service: $json.service, urgency: $json.urgency, summary: $json.summary } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, leadId: $('Create CRM row + fire follow-up').item.json.id } }}
